---
title: "Unidad 1"
format: 
  revealjs:
    transition: slide
    navigation-mode: vertical
    slide-number: true
    css: ../assets/estilo.css
---

# Inicio

Este es un ejemplo simple de navegación.

```{=html}
<div class="btn-group">
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="Reveal.slide(1)">
    <img src="../assets/img/camara.png"> Video
  </button>
  <button class="nav-btn" onclick="Reveal.slide(2)">
    <img src="../assets/img/podcast.png"> Podcast
  </button>
</div>
```

---

# Video

Video integrado.

```{=html}
<iframe width="100%" height="400" 
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/J0VBnrIkAtA?si=19bKfV9gUHPboiO_&rel=0&modestbranding=1" 
  title="YouTube video player" 
  frameborder="0" 
  allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" 
  referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" 
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
```

```{=html}
<br><br>
<button onclick="Reveal.slide(0)">Volver al inicio</button>
```

---

# Podcast

Audio integrado.

```{=html}
<audio controls>
  <source src="podcast.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">
</audio>
```

```{=html}
<br><br>
<button onclick="Reveal.slide(0)">Volver al inicio</button>
```

---

# Interacción simple

Presioná el botón para mostrar texto.

```{=html}
<button onclick="mostrar()">Mostrar texto</button>

<div id="texto" style="display:none; margin-top:20px;">
Este contenido aparece al presionar el botón.
</div>

<script>
function mostrar() {
  document.getElementById("texto").style.display = "block";
}
</script>
```


```{=html}
<iframe
width="800"
height="500"
style="border:0"
loading="lazy"
allowfullscreen
src="https://www.google.com/maps?q=Buenos+Aires&output=embed">
</iframe>
```
